build.beforeBuildCommand: pnpm --filter @workspace/autocoder run build && pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run build

security.csp: default-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' http://localhost:* ws://localhost:* https://*; img-src 'self' data: https:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-eval' 'unsafe-inline';

bundle.longDescription: AutoCoder generates complete, runnable web applications from natural language descriptions. Pair with Ollama or LM Studio for fully local, offline-first code generation.
